# Visual release proof

Release SHA: `04196921264d9897e8e547a8e0a2cef1ad43f8fb`  
Result: PASS

The live initial, invalid, confirmed, revisit, storage-error, unavailable, and malformed-storage surfaces were inspected at 390x844 and 1440x900. There was no horizontal overflow at either declared viewport. The paper canvas, dark green ink, terracotta accent, sharp geometry, editorial type hierarchy, and dominant confirmation moment agree with `DESIGN.md`. No gradients, glass cards, emoji, dashboard chrome, placeholder copy, clipping, or broken layout were observed.

The screenshot set is indexed in `docs/build/evidence-index.json`.
